_note: Singapore public holidays as YYYY-MM-DD (local). On these dates the app shows the 'Sun / PH' schedule. Only the four FIXED-DATE 2026 holidays are seeded here because they are the same every year and always correct. The variable-date holidays (Chinese New Year, Good Friday, Hari Raya Puasa, Vesak Day, Hari Raya Haji, Deepavali) change yearly and MUST be added from MOM's official gazette: https://www.mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/public-holidays . Add each observed date (including any Monday observed when a holiday falls on a Sunday).
